title: ipomoea barlerioides
intro: Ipomoea barlerioides, also known as the Blue Passion Flower or Manjishtha, is a perennial climber that belongs to the Convolvulaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ipomoea barlerioides include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support skin health, making it a popular herb in traditional Indian medicine. Ipomoea barlerioides can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are commonly used to treat various health conditions, including skin disorders and digestive issues.
